name: Cheesy Nachos
recipeIngredient: 1 Bag (10 oz) plain, salted tortilla chips
1 can (11 oz) condensed nacho-flavored cheese soup
3/4 cup bottled hot, thick, chunky salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread tortilla chips over a large platter.
2. In a medium saucepan, combine undiluted soup, salsa, and 3 tablespoons water. Heat over low heat until it simmers, stirring occasionally. Simmer for 1 minute.
3. Pour the soup mixture over the chips. Sprinkle with scallions and olives.
Makes 8 servings.
Per serving: 235 calories, 5 g protein, 26 g carbohydrate, 14 g fat, 9 mg cholesterol, 525 mg sodium.
